machine_start_gcode:
; === Start con Adaptive Mesh + Park + Preheat + Purge (Klipper) ===
G90
M83
M104 S150                                   ; preheat nozzle anti-ooze (preriscaldo)
M140 S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single]

G28                                         ; homing
BED_MESH_CLEAR

; --- Adaptive Bed Mesh (una sola riga!) ---
BED_MESH_CALIBRATE mesh_min={adaptive_bed_mesh_min[0]},{adaptive_bed_mesh_min[1]} mesh_max={adaptive_bed_mesh_max[0]},{adaptive_bed_mesh_max[1]} PROBE_COUNT={bed_mesh_probe_count[0]},{bed_mesh_probe_count[1]} ADAPTIVE=1 ADAPTIVE_MARGIN=0

; --- PARK: front-left a ~2 cm ---
G1 Z20 F3000                                ; quota di sicurezza/parcheggio
G1 X5 Y5 F6000                              ; angolo front-left (modifica se vuoi)

; --- heat finale al parcheggio ---
M190 S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single]
M104 S[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer]
M109 S[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer]

; --- purge lines ---
G92 E0
G1 Z0.30 F300
G1 X2.0 Y10 F3000
G1 X2.0 Y140 E10 F1500
G1 X2.3 Y140 F5000
G92 E0
G1 X2.3 Y10 E10 F1200
G92 E0
name: Copilot Ender 3 S1 Pro 0.4mm
